isi.lyrics:
Lyric WOODZ - STOP THAT

Romanization

Oh oh naneun saemi mana saem
geu sogeseo suyeonghaneun gibuneun mwot gata maeil
Oh oh jyaeneun taega nanda yae
naneun bureoum sogeseo nareul jugigiro hae

He can do that
And she can too
But I can’t

Oh oh nareul gadwoduji maeil
gateun kkumeul kkuji aneul yonggireul naegiro hae
Oh oh sarajineun geot gata
eoneusae naneun geureon sarami anin geot gata

I can do that
But I won’t

Shut up, ‘cause you know
Don’t fake it for show
I catch your flow
Oh what you long for

I can’t control
Feel so small
I lose my way
Stop that

Oh oh 12worui tibi sok
naneun eodiedo eomneun ge ijeneun neomu dangyeon
And I said ‘mom I’ll get there next year’
geokjeong mallan mal sogen nan tto saemi hanggadeuk

I can do that
But I won’t

Shut up, ‘cause you know
Don’t fake it for show
I catch your flow
Oh what you long for

I can’t control
Feel so small
I lose my way

I bite my tongue, and the taste of blood
they wouldn’t know
These painted smiles on my face start crackin’
I lose control
I hate the way I keep pretendin’
actin’ like I don’t know
All this fire in my chest got nowhere left to go

Let me go
I lost hope
Shattered soul
No one knows
I might blow

Shut up, ‘cause you know
Don’t fake it for show
I catch your flow
Oh what you long for

I can’t control
Feel so small
I lose my way
Stop that

Hangeul

Oh oh 나는 샘이 많아 샘
그 속에서 수영하는 기분은 뭣 같아 매일
Oh oh 쟤는 태가 난다 얘
나는 부러움 속에서 나를 죽이기로 해

He can do that
And she can too
But I can’t

Oh oh 나를 가둬두지 매일
같은 꿈을 꾸지 않을 용기를 내기로 해
Oh oh 사라지는 것 같아
어느새 나는 그런 사람이 아닌 것 같아

I can do that
But I won’t

Shut up, ‘cause you know
Don’t fake it for show
I catch your flow
Oh what you long for

I can’t control
Feel so small
I lose my way
Stop that

Oh oh 12월의 티비 속
나는 어디에도 없는 게 이제는 너무 당연
And I said ‘mom I’ll get there next year’
걱정 말란 말 속엔 난 또 샘이 한가득

I can do that
But I won’t

Shut up, ‘cause you know
Don’t fake it for show
I catch your flow
Oh what you long for

I can’t control
Feel so small
I lose my way

I bite my tongue, and the taste of blood
they wouldn’t know
These painted smiles on my face start crackin’
I lose control
I hate the way I keep pretendin’
actin’ like I don’t know
All this fire in my chest got nowhere left to go

Let me go
I lost hope
Shattered soul
No one knows
I might blow

Shut up, ‘cause you know
Don’t fake it for show
I catch your flow
Oh what you long for

I can’t control
Feel so small
I lose my way
Stop that

isi.lyrics:
Lyric WOODZ - Downtown

Romanization

On my way, now it’s time to go
City calls, hear it pull me close
Flashing lights make the whole night come alive
Smoke and sound make the air feel tight
Moving past the neon sign
Every turn takes me deeper, I can’t hide

Run, don’t stop, go
Seeing the sky glow

Got my dreams, rolling fast, riding through the town
Ain’t no rusted wheels gonna shake me, hold me down
Wind blows strong, won’t ever slow me down
Sky is high, lights are bright, the city’s calling loud
To downtown

Don’t know when I’ll be back again
But today, I just need to run
Chasing roads that don’t care where I’m from
They think they’ve got it all
They ain't built to take a fall
My old truck’s got more heat than their whole town

Run, don’t stop, go
Seeing the sky glow

Got my dreams, rolling fast, riding through the town
Ain’t no rusted wheels gonna shake me, hold me down
Wind blows strong, won’t ever slow me down
Sky is high, lights are bright, the city’s calling loud
To downtown

Hangeul

On my way, now it’s time to go
City calls, hear it pull me close
Flashing lights make the whole night come alive
Smoke and sound make the air feel tight
Moving past the neon sign
Every turn takes me deeper, I can’t hide

Run, don’t stop, go
Seeing the sky glow

Got my dreams, rolling fast, riding through the town
Ain’t no rusted wheels gonna shake me, hold me down
Wind blows strong, won’t ever slow me down
Sky is high, lights are bright, the city’s calling loud
To downtown

Don’t know when I’ll be back again
But today, I just need to run
Chasing roads that don’t care where I’m from
They think they’ve got it all
They ain't built to take a fall
My old truck’s got more heat than their whole town

Run, don’t stop, go
Seeing the sky glow

Got my dreams, rolling fast, riding through the town
Ain’t no rusted wheels gonna shake me, hold me down
Wind blows strong, won’t ever slow me down
Sky is high, lights are bright, the city’s calling loud
To downtown

isi.lyrics:
Lyric WOODZ - Bloodline

Romanization

Jolene evergreen summer of ‘69
Yeah that’s all I’ve known
crazy train purple rain back in black paradise,
Yeah that’s good for my soul

been burning oil all night
I do whatever I like
I been smilin’ for the camera
and all the ladies real nice

well that’s because…

I been baptized
in that good life
it’s in my bloodline

it’s that rebel
made of metal
it’s in my bloodline

gasoline six string strumming something insane

oh oh living like it’s ride or die
oh oh rock and roll from 9 to 5
oh oh got me in the spotlight
blame it on the ones that are gone
baby I been

I been baptized
in that good life
it’s in my bloodline

it’s that rebel
made of metal
it’s in my bloodline

la la la la la la la la la la la
la la la la la la la la la la la

blame it on my bloodline
it ain’t my fault
blame it on a past life
got me off the walls

I been baptized
in that good life
it’s in my bloodline

it’s that rebel
made of metal
it’s in my bloodline

la la la la la la la la la la la
la la la la la la la la la la la

la la la la la la la la la la la

it ain’t my fault

got me off the walls

I been baptized
in that good life
it’s in my bloodline

la la la la la la la la la la la

내겐 봄날 같았죠

그대와 걷는 이 밤은
날 설레게 하죠
오늘 밤은
기억들로 되지 않았음 해요

그댈 사랑한다는 말
아끼고 아낀 말
그댈 위해
적혀진 이 마음을 꼭 
말하고 싶어요

그대와 걸을 모든 날
날 설레게 하죠
이제부터
추억들은 나랑 하기로 해요

그댈 사랑한다는 말
아무리 더 해도
부족한 맘 
적혀질 내 마음을 꼭 
옆에서 봐 줘요
